title: No error is reported when a negative value is assigned to a genvar when compiled with -g2001

features.name: genvar compared to negative literal in for loop
features.description: Code should include a genvar variable used in a generate for loop with a comparison against a negative literal like -1

features.name: genvar loop decrement wrapping
features.description: Code should include a genvar in a generate for loop that decrements past zero, causing unsigned wrap-around behavior
